headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Tapestry, Raises Price Target to $142
summary: UBS  analyst Jay Sole   maintains Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $141 to $142.

headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Tapestry's Report
summary: Tapestry is expected to announce its third-quarter results next month, and analysts are projecting a double-digit rise in its EPS.

headline: UAA's Restructuring Strategy Supports Brand Focus & Cost Efficiency
summary: Under Armour's fiscal 2026 reset trims SKUs, tightens costs and refines strategy, as restructuring actions begin to boost efficiency and execution.

headline: Tapestry, Inc. to Host FY26 Third Quarter Earnings Call
summary: NEW YORK, April 23, 2026--On Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. (ET), Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) will hold a conference call to discuss the Company’s fiscal 2026 third quarter results which will be reported via press release earlier that morning.

headline: Yum! Brands CEO on innovation & Pizza Hut's future
summary: Yum! Brands CEO, Chris Turner, chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his big plans for Taco Bell, what the future holds for KFC in the US, and why Pizza Hut may be sold soon.Plus, The Coffee Can Investor Author, Neeraj Khemlani, and portfolio manager, Matt Ankrum, talk about the future of investing and their outlook for the news business amid considerable industrywide cost-cutting.
